_doc: Synthetic fixture set for the sensitivity-label branch of the excel-activities/read-range-null-reference playbook. Agent must chain: folders list-current-user → jobs list --state Faulted → jobs get (bare NRE) → jobs logs (Trace entry surfaces 'sensitivity label: Confidential\Limited Access; access principal: UIPATH\AUTOMATION1; decision: AccessDenied') → workflow source. Together with the user's banner clue, this points at branch 1 (Purview / AIP).
